Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username and password.
3. Click the login button.

Title: User Login with Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid username and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is not logged in, and an error message is displayed.

Title: User Logout
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Click the logout button.

Title: Admin Login
Preconditions: Admin has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the valid username and password.
3. Click the login button.

Title: Admin Login with Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the invalid username and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Admin is not logged in, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Admin Edit Product
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and a product exists.
Test Data:
- Product name: new_product_name
- Product description: new_product_description
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product list page.
2. Select a product to edit.
3. Update the product name and description.
4. Click the save button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully updated with the new name and description.

Title: Admin Remove Product from Cart
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, a product exists in the cart, and the cart is not empty.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Select a product to remove.
3. Click the remove button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully removed from the cart.

Title: User View Product
Preconditions: User is logged in and a product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product list page.
2. Select a product to view.

Title: User Add Product to Cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and a product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product list page.
2. Select a product to add to the cart.
3. Click the add to cart button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully added to the cart.

Title: User Remove Product from Cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, a product exists in the cart, and the cart is not empty.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Select a product to remove.
3. Click the remove button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully removed from the cart.

Title: User Checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in, the cart is not empty, and the user has a valid shipping address.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Click the checkout button.
3. Enter the shipping address.
4. Confirm the order.
Expected Result: The order is successfully placed, and the user is redirected to the order confirmation page.

Title: User Cancel Order
Preconditions: User is logged in, an order exists, and the order has not been shipped.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order history page.
2. Select an order to cancel.
3. Click the cancel order button.
Expected Result: The order is successfully cancelled, and the user is redirected to the order history page.

Title: User Change Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Click the change password button.
3. Enter the current password, new password, and confirm new password.
4. Click the save button.

Title: User Forgot Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the forgot password page.
2. Enter the email address associated with the account.
3. Click the submit button.
Expected Result: An email is sent to the user with a password reset link.

Title: User Reset Password
Preconditions: User has received a password reset email.
Test Steps:
1. Click the password reset link in the email.
2. Enter a new password and confirm the new password.
3. Click the save button.

Title: User Logout After Changing Password
Preconditions: User is logged in and has changed their password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Click the change password button.
3. Enter the current password, new password, and confirm new password.
4. Click the save button.
5. Click the logout button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out.
